scores.correctness_notes: Mostly correct but has two issues: (1) the priority order is wrong — it lists ErrorStatus above BlockedStatus but omits that ErrorStatus and UnknownStatus cannot be passed to add_status() at all; (2) misses the note that MaintenanceStatus ranks below WaitingStatus (gold standard order is error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active, but agent lists error > blocked > waiting > maintenance > active)
scores.hallucination_notes: The priority order inversion (WaitingStatus ranked above MaintenanceStatus) is a factual error. Also omits the important constraint that ErrorStatus and UnknownStatus cannot be used with add_status() — not a hallucination per se but a meaningful omission that could mislead users.
